zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Mayenne於1150年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯維特雷-斯特時，她的父親Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne16歲，母親Constance De Bretagne32歲。她於1180年3月26日與André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1223年在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Mayenne于1150年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉雷斯維特雷-斯特时，她的父亲Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne16岁，母亲Constance De Bretagne32岁。她于1180年3月26日与André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1223年在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Mayenne was born in 1150, in Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, was 16 and her mother, Constance De Bretagne, was 32. She married André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré on 26 March 1180, in Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1223, in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Mayenne est née en 1150, à Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Constance De Bretagne, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré le 26 mars 1180, à Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1223, à Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

Sie hat am 26. März 1180 in Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1223 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Mayenneが1150年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインレンスヴィトルe-エストで生まれた時，父Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenneは16歳，母Constance De Bretagneは32歳であった。1180年3月26日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインでAndré II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1223年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Mayenne(이)가 1150년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 렌스 비트e-스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance De Bretagne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1180년 3월 26일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인에서 André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1223년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Mayenne nasceu em 1150, em Vitré-Est, Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Constance De Bretagne, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré em 26 de março de 1180, em Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Mayenne родилась в 1150 г. в местности витрe-ест, реннесь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroi de Mayenne III, Seigneur of Mayenne было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance De Bretagne, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré 26 марта 1180 г. в местности илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1223 г. в местности меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

Murió en 1223, en Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
